gate_text: Theta_morph is additive; Xi_t is multiplicative interval-control.
late-settling outer radial shape can be assigned to Theta_morph only.
epsilon_t cap is Xi_t-only protocol bound, not a morphology amplitude.
high-spin/envelope/asymmetry context remains shared or partially shared.
path/environment term remains zero unless source path review establishes it.
combined-control replay may be recorded; combined endpoint is not permitted.
